calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-10-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Shari D. Marks, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Hanmi Bank, a California banking corporation.
Joseph Woo, Special Asset Officer for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Studio City Sushi & Seafood Buffet, Inc., a California corporation, dba Todai Restaurant, Choo Cheon Chang, a/k/a Peter Chang, an individual or Jamie Lee, an individual.
Defaults were entered against defendants on July 15, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on October 26, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Hanmi Bank, a California banking corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendants Studio City Sushi & Seafood Buffet, Inc., a California corporation, dba Todai Restaurant, Choo Cheon Chang, a/k/a Peter Chang, an individual or Jamie Lee, an individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $271,838.60.
Prejudgment Interest - $32,222.66.
Late Charges - $2,588.21.
Attorney's Fees - $6,158.54.
Costs - $550.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $313,358.51.

Additionally, it is further Ordered that plaintiff Hanmi Bank, a California banking corporation, recover for defendants Studio City Sushi & Seafood Buffet, Inc., a California corporation, dba Todai Restaurant, a Judgment for Claim fo Delivery, and for possession of the personal property described on page two of the Judgment.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
